data.title: Verify validate.sh passes on template-installed project
data.description:
## Description

Create a test that verifies validate.sh --ci passes on a project created via the template onboarding path. This is the integration test proving the full template → onboarding → DSO infrastructure pipeline works.

### Implementation
- Create a test script that:
  1. Creates a temp directory
  2. Simulates template installation (create marker files matching a template: e.g., package.json for NextJS)
  3. Runs detect-stack.sh to verify detection works
  4. Verifies dso-config.conf can be generated with detected values
  5. Verifies the config resolution order works correctly (template config vs host config)
- Also verify Jekyll path produces a valid project structure

### File Impact
- CREATE: tests/scripts/test-template-validate-integration.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Integration test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-template-validate-integration.sh
- [ ] Test is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-template-validate-integration.sh
- [ ] Test passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-template-validate-integration.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added
  Verify: grep -q 'template-validate-integration' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
